case_title: GLEN SMITH VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S), OBTAIN ANSWER(S), ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR FILE CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT(S) RE: COORDINATION STATUS. THE JAN-07-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-08-2014 CONTINUED TO JAN-07-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, GLEN AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH LLC JOHN DOES DRUG COMPANY 1-6 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-04-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-03-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-12-2014 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. BY COURT. PER ORDER FILED DECEMBER 18, 2014, THIS CASE HAS BEEN ADDED TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATION PROCEEDING NO. 4631, REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
